results.definition_en: The way two things or people are joined or connected.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 關係、關聯；兩者連結的方式。
results.example_en: The relation between father and son is close.

results.definition_en: A system of belief in a god or gods, with its own ways and rules.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 宗教；對神祇的信仰體系及其規範。
results.example_en: She studies the religion of the East.

results.definition_en: A person who speaks or acts for others.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 代表；代他人發言或行動者。
results.example_en: Each class has one representative.
results.example_zh_tw: 每個班級都有一名代表。

results.definition_en: An act of asking for a thing.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 請求、要求；提出獲取某物之請。
results.example_en: She made a request for help.

results.definition_en: A good feeling about a person for their qualities.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 尊敬、尊重；對某人特質的肯定感受。
results.example_en: I have great respect for my teacher.

results.definition_en: A time when one does not work or move.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 休息、安歇；不勞動或不移動的時段。
results.example_en: Take a long rest after your work.

results.definition_en: A thing given to a person for good work or help.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 獎賞、回報；因善行所獲之物。
results.example_en: She gave him a reward for finding her dog.
results.example_zh_tw: 她給找回她狗的他一份獎賞。

results.definition_en: A regular beat in music or speech.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 節奏、韻律；音樂或語言中的規律拍子。
results.example_en: The rhythm of the song made us move.
results.example_zh_tw: 歌曲的節奏讓我們跟著動。

results.definition_en: A small white grain used as food, much eaten in the East.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 稻米、白飯；常見於東方飲食的白色小穀粒。
results.example_en: We have rice for dinner.

results.definition_en: A big flow of water that goes from high land to the sea or a lake.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 河、河川；自高地流向海或湖的大量水流。
results.example_en: The river runs through the town.

results.definition_en: A way made for cars and people to go from place to place.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 道路、馬路；供車輛與行人通行的路線。
results.example_en: The road to the city is long.

results.definition_en: An act of turning over and over; or a small loaf of bread.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 滾動；或小麵包卷。
results.example_en: The ball took a slow roll down the hill.

results.definition_en: A part of a building closed in by walls.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 房間；建築物中以牆隔出的空間。
results.example_en: My room has two windows.

results.definition_en: A back-and-forth motion of one thing on another.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 摩擦、揉搓；兩物來回相觸的動作。
results.example_en: Give the wood a good rub with the cloth.
results.example_zh_tw: 用布把木頭好好擦一擦。

results.definition_en: A word that says how one should act.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 規則、規範；指導行為的準則。
results.example_en: It is a rule of the school to be quiet.

results.definition_en: An act of going fast on the feet.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 跑、奔跑；用雙腳快速移動。
results.example_en: Take a long run in the park.

results.definition_en: A white stuff in small bits, put on food to make it taste better.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 鹽；用於調味的白色細顆粒。
results.example_en: Add some salt to the soup.

results.definition_en: Very small bits of broken stone, found on beaches.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 沙、沙子；海灘上常見的細碎石粒。
results.example_en: The children played in the sand.

results.definition_en: A tool used to find the weight of a thing; or a row of numbers in order.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 秤；或量度等級的序列。
results.example_en: Put the cheese on the scale.

results.definition_en: The study of how things in the world work.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 科學；研究世界運作方式的學問。
results.example_en: She loves science at school.
results.example_zh_tw: 她在學校最喜歡自然科學。

results.definition_en: The great body of salt water that covers much of the earth.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 海、海洋；覆蓋地球大部分的鹹水域。
results.example_en: We swam in the sea last week.

results.definition_en: A thing made for one to sit on.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 座位；供人坐的物件。
results.example_en: Take a seat by the window, please.

results.definition_en: A person whose work is to keep notes and answer letters for another.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 祕書；負責記事與處理信件的職員。
results.example_en: His secretary will book the room.

results.definition_en: The act of picking one or more from a group.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 選擇、挑選；自眾多事物中擇取。
results.example_en: Her selection of books is wide.

results.definition_en: The person one is.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 自己、自身；個體本身。
results.example_en: Take good care of your self.
